body.title: [sprint] Migrate the ~21 Postgres ticket-state readers to the ticket-store module (phased)
body.description:
**Problem:** ~21 files read ticket state from clan.memories/devlab.tickets. If they aren't migrated before PG is dropped, dispatch silently hangs (Granny workflow_executor.get_ticket_status returns None → steps never reach 'done'), dashboards blank, search returns nothing. This is the fix-one-leave-many boundary of the cutover.

**Proposed shape:** Swap each reader's SQL for a ticket_store import. PHASED, dispatch-critical first, each phase independently committable & reversible:
  Phase 1 (dispatch-critical, do first): devices/granny/{daemon,shim,workflow_executor}.py, devices/queue/device.py.
  Phase 2 (surfaces): devices/web_server/server.py, unseen_university/devices/librarian/tools/{search_tools,ticket_tools}.py, devices/librarian/node_registry.py, devices/scraps/jobs/orphan_watchdog.py, devices/igor/cognition/{action_claim_verifier,dreaming}.py.
  Phase 3 (dev tools): devlab/claudecode/{stall_check,completion_audit,ticket_detail_eval,uuquestions,uushowticket,uuticketadd,cc_nightly_context_prep}.py.
  LEAVE (migration/archival): migrate_tickets.py, migrate_wg_to_memories.py, unseen_university/migrations/m_devlab.py.
**Affected files:** the ~18 readers above (Phases 1-3); imports ticket_store. (May SPLIT into 3 child tickets by phase at audit-ticket — acceptable.)
**Design rules:** NO SQLITE. Each reader uses the store module, no direct ticket SQL. Log nothing new unless adding a crossing. Verify each phase keeps its subsystem working before the next.
**Scope boundary:** IN — migrate Phase 1-3 readers to the store module. OUT — building the store (T-ticket-store-module); cc_queue.py itself (T-cc-queue-fs-first); dropping PG tables (T-ticket-pg-drop).
**Completion criteria:** `grep -rl 'clan\.memories\|devlab\.tickets' --include=*.py` over non-migration source shows zero TICKET-STATE readers; Granny wave advances steps reading FS; web_server shows tickets with PG stopped.
**Test plan:** Per phase: run that subsystem's tests + a smoke check (Granny tick advances a dispatched step to done from an FS status; web_server ticket list renders; stall_check runs) with PG down.
